App.Tagline: Versioned backups for any game's saves
Folders.BackupLabel: Store backups in  (must be outside the save folder)
How.ImageTypes: Show preview image of these types (optional)
How.CompanionLabel: Also back up these files (outside the save folder)
How.CompanionHint: Captured with every snapshot and restored to their original location. Absolute paths, or use ** for a recursive wildcard.
How.ExcludeLabel: Exclude these from backups (inside the save folder)
How.ExcludeWatermark: e.g. *.log   or   cache/**   (one pattern per line)
How.ExcludeHint: Matched files are never copied into a snapshot, and a restore leaves them untouched. No "/" matches a file or folder name at any depth; with "/" it's relative to the save folder and ** spans subfolders.
Empty.Title: No game selected
Empty.Subtitle: Add a game to start protecting its saves.
Status.SetWatchFolder: Set the watch folder to start protecting its saves.
Status.ProfileRemoved: Profile removed. Backup files were left on disk.
Status.Restored: Restored backup from {0}. A pre-restore safety copy was saved.
Steam.Found: Found {0} installed game(s). Pick the ones to protect.
Steam.NoGames: No installed games found in your Steam library.
Steam.NotInstalled: Steam wasn't found on this PC. Add games manually instead.
Steam.SaveNotFound: Save folder not found — choose it manually
Steam.ResolvedFrom.Database: Save folder from the built-in game list
Steam.ResolvedFrom.Heuristic: Likely save folder (found by name) — please verify
Dialog.DeleteProfile.Title: Delete profile
Dialog.DeleteProfile.Body:
Remove "{0}" from SaveGuard?

Your existing backup files are NOT deleted.
Dialog.Restore.Title: Restore this backup
Dialog.Restore.Body:
Replace the current save folder with the backup from
{0}?

Your current saves will be snapshotted first (labelled "pre-restore"), so this can be undone.
Dialog.DeleteBackup.Title: Delete backup
Folders.BackupHint: With a shared backup folder set (Settings), leave this blank or enter a subfolder. Otherwise enter an absolute path.
Status.BackupAppliedToAll: Switched {0} game(s) to the shared backup folder.
Settings.Title: Settings
Settings.GlobalBackupLabel: Shared backup folder (used by all games)
Settings.GlobalBackupWatermark: e.g. D:\SaveBackups   (blank = each game needs its own absolute path)
Settings.GlobalBackupHint: When set, a game's backup path can be a relative subfolder or left blank — it goes under this folder. When blank, each game must set its own absolute path.
Settings.ApplyToAllHint: Switch every game to the shared folder (clears their individual paths). Existing backups stay where they are.
